response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual contributor with a broad technical background and over 15 years of hands-on engineering experience, but the resume shows no evidence of executive or people-management experience at the scale this CTO role demands. There is no indication of having built or led engineering organizations, managed technical leadership layers, or operated at board level. His AI-agent exposure is recent and limited to tooling and MCP framework support — not the production, regulated, multi-agent fintech systems central to this role. Fintech depth is superficial (one investment-platform role), and critical hard requirements around scaling teams, governing outsourced engineering, and operating AI systems under regulatory constraints are entirely absent.
strengths: Long career (15+ years) across distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput backend work — provides credible technical foundations.
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP-based agentic tooling, showing awareness of the agentic space.
Demonstrated ability to deliver in high-scale environments (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby) and across diverse technology stacks.
concerns: No people management, team scaling, or organizational leadership experience visible anywhere in the resume — a hard blocker for a CTO role requiring 10→30+ headcount growth.
AI/agentic experience is limited to developer tooling and MCP code generators, not production multi-agent systems operating under financial or regulatory consequences.
Fintech infrastructure depth is minimal; one investment-platform role (RIDE Capital) with no mention of credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, or compliance architecture.

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-throughput backend background
